shared: A standardized 2x2 equid conformation reference board on a neutral sage-gray seamless studio background, soft diffuse key light, realistic adult horse, no tack, no bridle, no saddle, no props, no text. Keep exactly the same individual, coat markings, scale, and lighting in all four panels. Top left: natural standing three-quarter view. Top right: exact standing profile. Bottom left: front-facing standing conformation view. Bottom right: head and neck close-up. Full solid hooves visible in standing panels, natural equid anatomy, documentary reference photography, square board.

breeds.domestic-horse: Adult domestic horse (warmblood/thoroughbred type) with long elegant legs, deep chest, long neck, long muzzle, erect ears, short sleek bay coat with black mane and tail and black lower legs, small white star on forehead, dark eyes, solid single-toed hooves, natural long black tail.
